hardRules: No transition may imply human approval without an explicit user verdict.
canonicalApproved/runtimeEligible/runtimeIntegrated must remain false unless an explicit task contract authorizes the transition after human approval.
READY_FOR_CC requires concrete handoff artifacts or exact repository paths; prose-only claims are insufficient.
READY_FOR_HUMAN_REVIEW requires reviewable artifacts or direct links/paths to them.
BLOCKED requires blocker.code, blocker.resolver, and blocker.resolution.
DONE requires requiredOutputs complete and validation results recorded from actual runs where required.
